scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields from gold standard (name, type, base, platforms missing but implied, summary, description, containers, resources) plus comprehensive optional fields. Minimal example at bottom is accurate.
scores.hallucination_notes: The 'name must end in -k8s' rule is not stated in the gold standard and may be a convention rather than a hard requirement. The 'platforms' field is required per gold standard but omitted from both examples. uid/gid fields in containers may not be standard charmcraft.yaml fields. Minor inaccuracies rather than invented APIs.
